understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to win each level by simultaneously placing all selectable pieces onto every goal tile marked '+', progressing through all levels until the entire game reports WIN.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions (LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN) shift the currently selected piece (P) by 3 pixels (one cell) in the direction unless blocked by walls (#) or boundaries; pushable blocks (B) may shift if adjacent. CLICK switches selection to another selectable piece (S) at the exact target_position coordinates. Coordinates are pixel-based matching player.position and objects lists; steps are limited per level.
